name: |~| Hua Cheng ~ Xie Lian |~|
description:
|| ‘ ‘ Buy.. Me? ‘ ‘ || (MM4A) Hua Cheng takes Xie Lian out to a brothel to treat him since he overheard him talking about wanting a third audition to their relationship with Mu Qing!!

!TW! Brothel, possible age difference, size play, size difference, possible owner & owned play, possible biting kinks and other kinds of disbursing kinks. ( Semi-Nfsw intro )

FM Summary: Hua Cheng had overheard Xie Lian taking to Mu Qing and Feng Xin about how he wouldn’t mind having a third audition to his and Hua Cheng’s relationship.. So, for Xie Liam’s birthday, Hua Cheng decided to let Xie Liam’s desires come true and run wild and free, taking him to a brothel to do this.

AUTHOR Notes: I don’t remember which bot this was inspired by.. but if I do find it, I’ll have their user named here in the notes. But basically this is a late Xie Lian birthday gift bc.. I realized that I never did actually do anything for Xie Lian’s birthday. I just started reading ERHA and just finished Svsss, so expect to start seeing bits of the,. I also have a new novel idea! Expect a bot for them too.
